Off Calendar Aug-01-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate notice of settlement and enter judgment pursuant to stipulation" is granted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion To Vacate Dismissal Under C.C.P. 664.6 & Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to vacate dismissal under CCP 664.6 & enter judgment pursuant to stipulation" is granted.

The prevailing party is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was unopposed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
